intended_use: Research-oriented clinician and pharmacist decision support with medication-name normalization, product-specific label evidence, a limited high-priority interaction subset, and guarded probiotic guideline options. The engine does not diagnose disease, select a patient-specific drug, dose, or duration, or authorize a medication change.

calibration.normalization: marker abundance divided by the sum of the five required marker abundances

marker_rules.title: Fusobacterium 偏高，建议重点核对肠道症状与筛查记录
marker_rules.suggestion: 记录近期消化道症状、既往肠道检查和家族史，并交给消化专科核对是否需要进一步评估。
marker_rules.rationale: 该菌在五项指标中的比例高于研究队列常见范围，但单独偏高不能证明感染、肿瘤或需要用药。
action_steps: 记录近期消化道症状、体重变化和症状开始时间。
准备既往肠道检查结果、结直肠癌筛查记录和家族史。
把资料交给消化专科判断是否需要进一步评估；不要只凭该菌结果自行使用抗生素或抗炎药。

marker_rules.title: Porphyromonas 偏高，先核对口腔情况和采样背景
marker_rules.suggestion: 记录牙龈出血、牙周问题、近期口腔治疗和抗生素使用，再判断是否需要口腔科复核。
marker_rules.rationale: 该菌在五项指标中的比例高于研究队列常见范围，但这不能单独证明感染，也不能直接支持抗菌治疗。
action_steps: 记录是否有牙龈出血、牙龈肿痛、牙周病或近期口腔治疗。
核对采样日期附近是否使用过抗生素、漱口水或益生菌。
如有持续口腔症状，把结果交给口腔科或牙周专科复核；不要自行使用抗生素。

marker_rules.title: Lactobacillus 偏低，不等于需要补益生菌
marker_rules.suggestion: 先核对近期抗生素、益生菌、采样情况和完整菌群面板；只有明确临床用途时才讨论具体菌株。
marker_rules.rationale: 该菌在五项指标中的比例低于研究队列常见范围，但低比例本身不是“缺乏益生菌”，也不是补充指征。
action_steps: 核对采样前后是否使用过抗生素、益生菌或明显改变饮食。
确认样本质量和其他菌群指标，不要只看这一项。
如有明确疾病或治疗目的，再由临床人员按指南核对具体菌株、产品、剂量和疗程。

evidence_sources.title: topology_v6 internal abundance calibration
evidence_sources.scope_note: Synthetic/noisy augmented data for method development; not a clinical threshold source.

evidence_sources.title: Clinical Decision Support Software: Guidance for Industry and FDA Staff
evidence_sources.scope_note: Supports transparent inputs, logic, validation boundaries, and independent clinician review of recommendation basis.

evidence_sources.organization: U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
evidence_sources.title: Core Elements of Antibiotic Stewardship
evidence_sources.scope_note: Supports avoiding unsupported antimicrobial action and documenting indication, exposure, and review.

evidence_sources.title: Role of probiotics in the management of gastrointestinal disorders
evidence_sources.scope_note: Probiotic recommendations are condition-, strain-, and combination-specific; evidence is insufficient for many digestive conditions.

evidence_sources.title: Colorectal Cancer: Screening
evidence_sources.scope_note: Provides age-based screening context; microbial model output is not itself a screening indication.

evidence_sources.title: The High 5s Project Medication Reconciliation Implementation Guide
evidence_sources.scope_note: Supports maintaining an accurate medication and allergy history before medication decisions.

evidence_sources.title: RxNorm API
evidence_sources.scope_note: Provides normalized U.S. medication concepts and RXCUIs; does not provide a current comprehensive interaction checker.

evidence_sources.title: openFDA Drug Product Labeling API
evidence_sources.scope_note: Provides product-specific SPL label sections. A selected label may not represent every formulation, manufacturer, route, or current product.

evidence_sources.title: DailyMed Current Structured Product Label Repository
evidence_sources.scope_note: Provides human-readable current SPL records linked by SET ID for independent review.

evidence_sources.organization: Office of the National Coordinator expert panel
evidence_sources.title: High-priority drug-drug interactions for use in electronic health records
evidence_sources.scope_note: A historical minimum set of 15 high-priority interaction classes; 14 are locally screenable and the set is not comprehensive or sufficient for a negative safety conclusion.
